fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Contextual information about the eligibility message, including source, target, product details, and criteria

children.name: source_department
children.description: The originating department that compiled the eligible customer list

children.name: target_department
children.description: The receiving department responsible for marketing the product

children.name: product_name
children.description: The name of the investment product for which customers are being evaluated

children.name: generated_date
children.description: The timestamp when the eligibility list was generated

children.name: eligibility_criteria
children.description: The business rules applied to determine customer eligibility for the product

fields.name: eligible_customers
fields.description: List of customers who meet the eligibility criteria for the Premium Growth Investment Fund

children.name: customer_id
children.description: Unique identifier assigned to the customer within the bank

children.name: email
children.description: Primary email address for the customer, used for marketing communications

children.name: account_balance
children.description: Current account balance in the customer's investment account, used to verify eligibility threshold

children.name: customer_tenure_months
children.description: Number of months the customer has been with the bank, used to verify minimum tenure eligibility requirement

children.name: investment_experience_level
children.description: Customer's self-assessed or assessed investment experience category

children.name: risk_profile
children.description: Customer's risk tolerance classification used to tailor product recommendations

children.name: last_investment_activity
children.description: The most recent date on which the customer engaged in an investment transaction

children.name: recommended_product_allocation
children.description: The suggested investment strategy or fund allocation tier for this customer based on their profile

fields.name: summary
fields.description: Aggregate statistics and campaign metadata for the eligible customer cohort

children.name: total_eligible_customers
children.description: Count of customers who meet the eligibility criteria

children.name: total_eligible_assets
children.description: Sum of all account balances across eligible customers

children.name: average_account_balance
children.description: Mean account balance of eligible customers

children.name: campaign_priority
children.description: Priority level assigned to the marketing campaign for this product cohort
